name: Italian Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, vegetable shortening, baking powder, and anise. Mix well with your hands.
2. In another bowl, beat eggs, vanilla extract, and milk. Add to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined. Do not overmix or knead.
3. Using a cookie press, shape the dough into long strips about 1/2-inch wide. Cut into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
4. Alternatively, roll the dough into walnut-sized balls and flatten to about 1 1/2 inches thick.
5. Dip the top of each biscotti piece in an egg white beaten with a few drops of water.
6. Roll the biscuits in sesame seeds.
7. Place the biscotti on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them evenly.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
Cook until done and enjoy!
